inputs.label: Cement Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of cement in the concrete batch, typically in kilograms.

inputs.label: Water Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of water in the batch, including water in admixtures if applicable.

inputs.label: Fine Aggregate (Sand) Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of fine aggregate (sand) in the batch.

inputs.label: Coarse Aggregate Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of coarse aggregate (gravel or crushed stone) in the batch.

inputs.label: Admixture Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of chemical admixtures added (if any), in kilograms. Convert liquid volume to mass using density if applicable.

inputs.label: Fresh Concrete Density
inputs.businessContext: Measured unit weight (density) of the fresh concrete. Typical range: 2200–2500 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Cement Bag Mass
inputs.businessContext: Standard mass of one cement bag (e.g., 50 kg). Used to calculate yield per bag.

formulas.yieldPerBag: ((cementMass + waterMass + fineAggregateMass + coarseAggregateMass + admixtureMass) / freshDensity) / (cementMass / bagMass)
